case_title: UNITED FINANCIAL CASUALTY COMPANY VS. LISSET RIVERA-RODAS ET AL

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF OCT-21-2020 CONTINUED TO DEC-23-2020 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $300.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 66005147) AS TO DEFENDANT RIVERA-RODAS, LISSET
